text:
A timeline of all events from the Attack on Titan spinoffs intended to take place in the main storyline.
{| class="aotable"
|-
! Year
! Event
|-
|760|| Angel Aaltonen is born.

Carlo Pikale is born to Jorge Pikale and his wife.

Sorum Humé is born.
|-
|763|| Corina Ilmari is born.
|-
|778|| Attack on Titan: Before the Fall 1 Gate to Shingashina is opened. Mammon kills over 5000 civilians. Kuklo is born.
|-
|791|| Kuklo is purchased from a freak show in Mitras by the nobleman Dario Inocencio. He befriends the noble's daughter Sharle Inocencio, who teaches him human speech and history.
|-
|793|| Attack on Titan: Kuklo Unbound
|-
|806|| Elliot Gurnberg Stratmann is born.
|-
|c.825|| Skies Above
|-
|827|| Rita Iglehaut is born.
|-
|c.830|| An Illustrated Guide to the Glorious Walled Cities
|-
|830|| Carly Stratmann is born to Elliot Gurnberg Stratmann and his wife.
|-
|842|| Rita Iglehaut enlists in the Training Corps.
|-
|844|| A Choice with No Regrets

Rita Iglehaut's Training Corps disbands. Rita becomes a recruit in the Garrison.
|-
|845|| Good Dog

Attack on Titan: The Harsh Mistress of the City
|-
|846|| Live and Let Die
|-
|850|| Garrison Girl

Lost in the Cruel World

Wall Sina, Goodbye
